name: ERICK.DEV
description: Cyberpunk 3D portfolio built with Three.js — procedural city, custom flight mechanics, instanced rendering, post-processing bloom.

name: AI CHAT PLATFORM
description: Real-time AI assistant with streaming responses, retrieval-augmented generation pipeline, and multi-model support. Handles 1000+ concurrent sessions.

name: DISTRIBUTED API GATEWAY
description: High-throughput API gateway with gRPC microservices. 99.9% uptime, sub-2ms p50 latency under load. Replaced a legacy monolith.

name: OBSERVABILITY PLATFORM
description: Full-stack observability system with custom metrics pipeline, distributed tracing, and automated alerting. Replaced legacy monitoring stack.
